socialTrends.name: Tesla, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Heavy retail debate after Tesla's Q2 deliveries beat estimates at 480,126, but domestic US sales plummeted 19.7%, prompting fears of a margins crunch.

socialTrends.name: Rivian Automotive, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Sensation among retail traders after Rivian raised its 2026 delivery guidance, signaling strong EV demand momentum.

socialTrends.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Heavily discussed after D.A. Davidson upgraded the stock to Buy with a $175 target, fueled by its sovereign AI deal with Nvidia.

socialTrends.name: NVIDIA Corp.
socialTrends.summary: Highly active discussion on buying the pullback as tech momentum rotates out, with many viewing sub-$200 as a major buying zone.

socialTrends.name: Robinhood Markets, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Surged on its launch of Robinhood Chain and Mizuho lifting its price target to $130, calling it the first online broker hyperscaler.

socialTrends.name: Intel Corp.
socialTrends.summary: Traders are buying options and discussing bottom-fishing strategies as the stock breaks support down to the $120 level.

socialTrends.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Heavy retail discussions on a sharp correction caused by a potential China memory ban risk, though long-term AI-supply arguments remain popular.
